summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU issues with Morpheus devices(VOY5200,VOY8200)
scenario: Language update stuck at 99% for 8 minutes before completing on Voyager 5200 and Voyager 8200
description_clean:
Three DFU issues with Voyager 5200 and Voyager 8200 (Morpheus devices):

Issue 1: Language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes before completing. Language updates previously took 1-2 minutes but now take 10 minutes or more.

Issue 2: After a successful device firmware update, the app still shows an available update for the Voyager 5200 headset, instead of showing the device as up to date.

Issue 3: When a phone call is active and a device firmware update is initiated, the DFU process gets stuck at 26%. Expected behavior is a pop-up message saying "Cannot update this device during a call".
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect to a Voyager 5200 or Voyager 8200 (Morpheus device)
Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update
Observe the progress bar during the language update
Wait for the update to complete
actual: Language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes before completing, taking 10 minutes or more total.
